subtasks.description: Extract all party names, their roles, and contact addresses from the multi-party contract

plan.cost_rationale: Single extraction task with moderate complexity (multiple fields across potentially multiple parties in a structured format). Assigned to mid tier because extract must identify and structure multiple related entities (party names, roles, addresses) from a document, which requires reasonable inference and consistent field population across variable numbers of parties. This is more complex than a fixed-schema single-entity extraction, but does not require cross-document inference or multi-signal reconciliation (frontier). No additional subtasks needed: party extraction, role identification, and address capture are all handled within one extract call."
